description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and frame, complemented by dark brown textured grip panels. The slide features subtle serrations at the rear for improved handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust. The magazine is partially ejected, revealing a single brass-colored cartridge at the top, and the magazine itself is finished in a matching dark tone. The barrel is of standard length, with a clean, unadorned muzzle and no visible threading or compensator. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external markings and a focus on functional ergonomics. The grip panels are checkered for enhanced control, and the handgun's proportions suggest a full-size model suitable for law enforcement or civilian use.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with dark brown checkered grips and a partially ejected magazine showing a brass cartridge. The design is functional and minimal, with subtle slide serrations and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with the magazine partially ejected and the checkered grip panel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backstrap of the grip and the alignment of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, displaying the ejected magazine and the right grip panel, with slide serrations visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the front of the trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features dark brown panels with a pronounced checkered texture for enhanced traction and control. The shape is slightly contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with a flat backstrap and subtle ergonomic curves along the sides. The surface pattern is uniform and grid-like, providing a classic appearance without visible logos or embellishments. The material appears to be a dense polymer or wood, contributing to a solid, non-slip feel. No finger grooves or decorative inlays are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. Its curvature is smooth, with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and it lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is straightforward and functional, with no integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unthreaded profile and a clean, circular muzzle opening. There are no visible compensators, ports, or external markings on the barrel exterior. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, maintaining a consistent appearance.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no prominent visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears plain, with only subtle serrations at the rear for grip, and no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations are apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, with a simple, utilitarian design. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the surface is smooth and untextured, matching the dark finish of the magazine body.
